{{Infobox character
| name = Kai
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
| name = Kai
| aliases = Master Kai
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = Traveler, Master, Master Kai
| abilities = complex sword pattern, stone and steel powers, call upon the Valinhall armory to manifest weapons, call stone to create a shield over his skin, open a Valinhall Gate, use the Dragon's Fang to open a Gate, steel-powered legs, iron scroll, black scroll, puff into smoke
| affiliations = Valinhall, the House, old Dragon Army
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

''See also: [[Kai Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Kai, also known as Master Kai, is a white-haired [[Traveler]] and a former member of the [[Dragon Army]]. As one of the twelve original soldiers, he was granted a key to [[the House]] forged by the Wanderer. Recognized as one of the last loyal members of his order, he was considered a primary hope for the army's restoration, though he is noted for fearing power rather than seeking it. His hair was prematurely whitened by the influence of [[the House]], and he often conceals his eyes behind shaggy bangs. Kai serves as a mentor and instructor, having trained [[Simon]]. His combat abilities are significant; he has successfully engaged [[Incarnations]] and utilized a long, gleaming weapon called Azura. He is also associated with the blade [[Mithra]]. Despite his skill, he has a reputation for wandering away at inconvenient times and has spent much of his life within [[Valinhall]]. He possesses a deep, protective attachment to small dolls, which he carves from wood and treats with great care. Throughout his history, Kai has been a student of figures such as [[Valin]] and [[Indirial]]. His life has involved significant travels, including journeys through the [[Badari Desert]] and the [[Latari Forest]]. He is described as having a varied personality, ranging from cheery and singsong to being perceived as an odd or even frightening individual by others. His journey eventually leads to his death, leaving behind a legacy tied to the succession of the [[Mithra]] blade.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Kai is a white-haired [[Traveler]] and a student of [[Valinhall]] who carries a doll named [[Caela]]. As a swordsman, he wields a seven-foot blade named Azura with ease and possesses a shadow chain mark on the back of his hand. He serves as [[Simon]]'s master, teaching him complex [[sword]] patterns and engaging in intense sparring sessions that involved twisting the youth's wrist a hundred times. Despite his skill, Kai is secretive with his student and refused a deal from the [[Eldest]] due to his fear of power. He is also known for his habit of hugging and stroking the hair of [[Otoku]] and [[Caela]].}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] is a white-haired man who carries a doll named [[Caela]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6">''House of Blades'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] is a [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]]'s name is [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] is a white-haired swordsman.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] carries a blade so long it nearly scrapes the far wall.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] possesses a [[sword]] named Azura.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] is a [[Traveler]] who has a student named [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] possesses dolls.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] has a large, expensive, and dimly lit bedroom.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7">''House of Blades'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] is capable of killing a shadow man while asleep.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] is [[Simon]]'s master.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] has white hair.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] refused the [[Eldest]]'s deal because he fears power.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c9">''House of Blades'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] taught [[Simon]] a complex [[sword]] pattern.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] is able to swing a seven-foot piece of [[steel]] easily.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] is someone who does not tell [[Simon]] anything.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] is a student of [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11">''House of Blades'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] has white bangs that cover his eyes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] has a mark on the back of his hand consisting of a single link of chain written in shadow.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] has the ability to let his [[sword]] go without it vanishing.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Erastes]]' [[sword]] moves are compared to [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] has experience sparring with [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] is a person who spoke to [[Simon]] about the sacrifices.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] had twisted [[Simon]]'s wrist a hundred times.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] was a person who used to hug and stroke the hair of [[Otoku]] and [[Caela]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17">''House of Blades'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Kai]] is an individual associated with the young one [[Manyu]] mentions.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18">''House of Blades'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A white-haired member of [[the House]] and a master who spent much of his life in the [[Latari Forest]], Kai is a [[dragon]] capable of manifesting weapons from the [[Valinhall armory]]. He utilizes various powers, such as calling upon stone and [[steel]] to create shields or enhance his jumping, and has been known to use a scimitar, the [[sword]] [[Mithra]], and a massive war-hammer made of [[Tartarus steel]]. Throughout his life, he has served as a teacher to Denner and [[Simon]], once even winning an unexpected fight against [[Indirial]] to defend the Wanderer's honor. Tasked with protecting the [[Naraka Incarnation]] in [[Malachi's realm]], Kai eventually finds himself fighting through a battle and engaging the [[Valinhall Incarnation]]. Ultimately, he faces execution by the [[Valinhall Incarnation]] and begins to die from a cursed wound.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] can call upon stone and [[steel]] powers.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] can call upon the [[Valinhall armory]] to manifest weapons.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is someone [[Simon]] compares himself to.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is a [[dragon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] has a scimitar in the [[Valinhall armory]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] possesses a war-hammer made of [[Tartarus steel]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] can call stone to create a shield over his skin.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is a member of [[the House]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] uses a war-hammer in combat.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] uses [[Benson's steel]] for defense.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] uses [[steel]]-powered legs to enhance his jumping.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] can banish his hammer back to [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] can open a [[Valinhall Gate]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] uses the [[Dragon's Fang]] to open a Gate.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is a character who uses the [[sword]] [[Mithra]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] was bound by chains that stabbed into his flesh.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] remembered something [[Kai]] said.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The hummingbird's head motion reminds [[Simon]] of [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is [[Simon]]'s master and has white hair.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] does not have the [[Nye essence]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is present and shakes his head.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is tasked with protecting the [[Naraka Incarnation]] in [[Malachi's realm]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] taught [[Simon]] a combination attack.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is an individual [[Simon]] has seen perform stances.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is described as having rampant cowardice by the Overlord.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] once fought [[Indirial]] to defend the Wanderer's honor.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] unexpectedly won a fight against [[Indirial]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] was meant to inherit [[the House]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] spent most of his life in [[the House]] or the [[Latari Forest]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is a master.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is an apprentice of someone (implied by [[Talos]]'s address to him, though he is called Master).<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is a teacher of Denner.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is present in the scene and being spoken to by [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] can summon a huge gleaming hammer.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] was fighting through the middle of the battle.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Master [[Kai]] was engaged in combat with the [[Valinhall Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is dying.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] has been irresponsible.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is being executed by the [[Valinhall Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Master [[Kai]] is a white-haired man covered in blood.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] was dying from a cursed wound.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] is a white-haired [[Traveler]] who limps and uses a cane.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25" />}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Once an eccentric genius radiating immense potential, Kai was a full member of the old [[Dragon Army]] who was eventually crippled by a [[Ragnarus blade]] during a fight against the [[Valinhall Incarnation]]. After retreating deep into [[the House]] to recover from his wounds, he spent decades living in seclusion where he spent his time talking to dolls and treating [[Valin]] as if he were the same person. The [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]], who carried a black-haired doll and a gold-and-silver blade, eventually underwent a transformation into an [[Incarnation]] that turned his skin to [[steel]]. This process left him halfway transformed and bleeding before he ultimately passed away, leaving a headstone in the graveyard.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] suffered a wound from a [[Ragnarus blade]] during the fight against the [[Valinhall Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] retreated deep into [[the House]] after being wounded.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] brushed [[Caela]]'s hair.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5">''City of Light'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] is currently trapped and useless.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] has been living with the dolls for decades.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] wields a short [[sword]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] was holding the mask at his belt.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] is treating [[Valin]] as if he were the same person.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] did not teach [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] is a [[Valinhall]] [[Traveler]] who spends his time talking to dolls.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Lycus]]'s mother warned him never to talk to Master [[Kai]] without another adult present.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] is relaxing by [[Valinhall]]'s healing pool.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] is a full member of the old [[Dragon Army]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] is a [[Traveler]] who lives in [[Valinhall]] and carries [[Mithra]] and a black-haired doll.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] wields a gold-and-silver blade.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] was crippled by Ragnarus.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] is a character featured in stories told to [[Simon]] by dolls.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] has not done much in the past two and a half decades.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] was once an eccentric genius who radiated potential.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The current [[Kai]] is a broken wreck who wants to play with dolls.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] is a person who would trade [[Mithra]] for Azura if [[Simon]] suggested it.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] has retreated to deep rooms.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] uses [[steel]] by reaching into [[Benson]]'s basement.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] wears a white-and-gray mask.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23">''City of Light'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] has a power called the 'iron scroll' or 'black scroll'.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] has black chains around his neck that are nearly complete.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] uses a weapon called [[Dragon's Fang]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] can puff into smoke.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] is transforming into an [[Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]]'s skin is turning to [[steel]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] was transformed halfway into an [[Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]]'s body was bleeding and transformed.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] is deceased and has a headstone in the graveyard.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Denner is [[Kai]]'s apprentice.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Caela]] says [[Simon]] was better than [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] is dead.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Kai bowed towards the leather man. “It has been too long, Chaka. I’d like you to meet my student.”<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"But Kai does not seek power. He fears it, as the candle’s wick fears the flame."<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"Kai doesn't tell me anything," Simon said.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"You must be the new, ah, young one of Kai’s."<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"Where do you wish to be, young dragon?"<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
